# screenshotURLs(fitting:)

**Instance Method**

An array of the app’s screenshot URLs.

## Declaration

```swift
func screenshotURLs(fitting size: CGSize) -> [URL]
```

## Parameters

- **size**: The size of the screenshots.

## Return Value

The URLs of the screenshots.

## Discussion

The screenshots scale to fit the given size.

## Obtaining general information

- **name**: The app’s localized name.
- **subtitle**: The app’s localized subtitle.
- **description**: The app’s localized description.
- **fileSize**: The size of the app in bytes.
- **iconURL(fitting:)**: A URL for the icon of the app.
